Designing and releasing Falcon Cloud and Falcon Editor from mvp to maturity. From Apr 2022 to Apr 2025.

TailwindCSS for Webflow

A cloneable utility site for Webflow users to utilize a framework based on TailwindCSS. Product Design at Ready Set Go 2021.

3 years and 3 months of internship experience

From 2014 to 2019. Internship experience through highschool and University of Waterloo co-op program.
